text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We ultimately decide to compete in an
international G1 race, and the three of us get
ready to depart for our trip.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Moments before boarding, however, Agnes
Tachyon reminds us of the significant risks we'll
be taking with the G1 race and presses me with a
question—should I really let Manhattan Cafe
compete abroad?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After weighing our goal of pursuing Manhattan
Cafe's friend against her own well-being, I rescind
my decision to let her compete abroad.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Regardless, Manhattan Cafe still plans on
traveling alone. Affected by the concerns of
those who believe in her, she finds herself unable
to take a single step...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we cancel our plans to go abroad and
make the Takarazuka Kinen our new goal.
